author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Exquisite Corpse — a blind collaborative storytelling game. Players take turns writing sentences, each seeing only the last 4 words of the previous one. The full story is revealed at the end.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
install_msg: Run `[p]load corpse` to enable. No extra dependencies required.
name: ExquisiteCorpse
